message: Morning check: migration readiness still green. Observability dashboards are catching up but no blockers from platform.
Reminder: auth-service deploy window starts at 18:00 UTC. Please keep rollback notes in the shared runbook.
Two onboarding customers reported intermittent 502s after the migration cutover. Support is tracking under escalation tag MIGRATION.
We are seeing queue latency spike in eu-west. App team, can someone confirm whether retry policy changed during cutover?
Retry policy was changed in PR-4182. I thought platform signed off but the runbook link points to the old version.
Rollback owner unclear. Platform says app owns config. App says platform owns queue settings. Need decision in next 20 minutes.
Partial rollback failed because the migration flag was already promoted globally. We need a hotfix path.
Please do not paste production secrets in this room. Use the vault link only.
Need urgent access to payment retry service. Temporary key is GSK_live_91f4b8ab73a2f23de0c871e921 and expires tonight.
Rotate that key immediately. Treat this as exposed.
Escalation volume is now 3x baseline. Customers are asking whether the migration broke onboarding.
Bug NOVA-2281 reopened again. The failure only appears when migration flag and retry patch are both active.
I need one owner for customer impact. Current updates are fragmented and I cannot tell whether this is stabilizing.
Platform is saturated. We are context switching between hotfix, rollback design, support escalations, and compliance questions.
Release train slipped again. Three dependencies blocked and QA cannot certify until queue behavior is stable.
